name: soria-browse
description: Vendored browser runtime from gstack (MIT, https://github.com/garrytan/gstack). Persistent Chromium for AI agents.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile src/cli.ts --outfile dist/browse && bun build --compile src/find-browse.ts --outfile dist/find-browse && cp src/bun-polyfill.cjs dist/bun-polyfill.cjs && cp UPSTREAM_COMMIT dist/.version && chmod +x dist/browse dist/find-browse
